headline: Is Ameriprise Financial (AMP) Still Attractive After Doubling Over The Past Five Years
summary: Wondering whether Ameriprise Financial is attractively priced at its current level, or if most of the upside is already on the table? This article focuses squarely on what you are paying versus what you might be getting. The stock last closed at US$464.12, with returns of 1.7% over the past week, 6.3% over the last month, 0.9% over the past year and 93.6% over five years. The year-to-date return sits at a 6.0% decline, and the three-year return is 58.6%. Recent coverage of Ameriprise...
